creator: daniel@morante.net
text:
Attempting to install FreeBSD on a Mac Pro G5 tower using the network install CD-ROM hangs with the following messages displayed on the console:

iichb0: I2C error
iichb0: I2C error
iichb0: I2C error
iichb0: I2C error
iichb0: I2C error
iichb0: I2C error
fcu0: iicbus write failed
..

The bsdinstall program does not start.

Fix: 

No Fix found.
How-To-Repeat: Boot a Power Mac Pro G5 from FreeBSD 9.0-RELEASE powerpc64 media (network install media used in this case).
